file_insights.purpose: Repository interface defining offline-first trip data management contract
key_features: Includes specialized query methods (getTripsByStatus, getTripsByDateRange, searchTrips)
Throws CacheException for offline cache misses

file_insights.purpose: Concrete implementation providing offline-first trip operations
key_features: Extends OfflineAwareRepository<Trip, LocalTripModel, Map<String, dynamic>, Map<String, dynamic>>
Implements complete CRUD with offline fallback
Integrates with TripDao, DioApiService, ConnectivityService, SyncQueueService
Provides helper methods for model conversion
Handles GraphQL mutations for remote operations

file_insights.purpose: DI module for travel feature dependency injection
key_features: Injects all required dependencies (TripDao, ApiService, ConnectivityService, SyncQueueService)

file_insights.changes: Added import for travel_module and registerTravelModule call in _registerFeatureModules
file_insights.impact: Enables DI for travel feature dependencies

file_insights.changes: Marked subtask 6.2 as completed with detailed implementation notes

patterns_discovered: Offline-first repository pattern using OfflineAwareRepository base class
Repository interface definition in domain layer with concrete implementation in infrastructure
Dependency injection module pattern for feature-specific dependencies
Soft delete pattern for local database operations
RepositoryOperationResult pattern for handling queued vs immediate operations
GraphQL mutation integration with repository pattern
gotchas_discovered: Complex generic type signature required for OfflineAwareRepository extension
Need for proper error handling at both local and remote operation levels
Soft delete implementation instead of hard delete for local cache consistency
Model conversion complexity between domain, local, and remote data structures
Dependency injection chain requiring proper service registration order
GraphQL variable construction needing careful handling for updates
recommendations: Add unit tests for TripRepositoryImpl to verify offline-first behavior
Consider adding integration tests for connectivity scenarios
Document the RepositoryOperationResult usage patterns for other developers
Review error handling consistency across all repository operations
Consider adding caching strategies for frequently accessed trips
Evaluate adding batch operations for bulk trip management
Implement proper dispose/cleanup methods for repository instances
Add logging levels for different operation types (create, update, delete, sync)
